name: aws-partner-central
description: Talk to the AWS Partner Central 3.0 agent from Claude. Handles AWS IAM Identity Center sign-in and SigV4 signing for you.
long_description:
This extension connects Claude Desktop to the AWS Partner Central 3.0 agent endpoint. Ask natural-language questions about your AWS partner account — opportunities, ACE deal registrations, invitations, partner programs, certifications, training — and Claude can answer using your live Partner Central data.

Sign-in is handled via AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO). The first time the extension is used in a session, your default browser opens to authorize this server. Subsequent calls reuse the cached token (valid for ~8 hours) until it expires.

No AWS CLI installation required. No long-lived access keys stored. Sessions are catalog-scoped (AWS vs Sandbox) and expire after 48 hours.

sso_start_url.title: AWS SSO Start URL
sso_start_url.description: Your AWS IAM Identity Center portal URL (e.g. https://your-org.awsapps.com/start). Find this in your AWS SSO admin or the email invite from your AWS administrator.

sso_account_id.title: AWS Account ID
sso_account_id.description: The 12-digit AWS account ID that has Partner Central enrolled. From the AWS SSO portal, click the account; the ID is shown under the name.

sso_role_name.title: AWS SSO Role Name
sso_role_name.description: The permission set / role name that grants Partner Central access. AWS resellers typically provision a role named 'PartnerCentral-Executives' for this.

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: AWS region for the Partner Central endpoint. Currently only 'us-east-1' is supported.

default_catalog.title: Default Catalog
default_catalog.description: Which Partner Central catalog to query by default. 'AWS' for production data, 'Sandbox' for testing. Tools can override this per-call.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Logging verbosity — debug, info, warn, or error. Logs go to stderr (visible in Claude Desktop's developer console).

tools.name: partner_central_send_message
tools.description: Send a natural-language message — optionally with file attachments (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, images) — to the AWS Partner Central agent and return its response. Use for pipeline insights, opportunities (ACE deal registrations), funding programs, solution recommendations, customer profiles, and creating/updating opportunities or fund requests.

tools.name: partner_central_respond_to_approval
tools.description: Approve, reject, or override a Partner Central write operation that is awaiting human confirmation (a send_message response with status 'requires_approval'). This is the only path through which a write actually executes.

tools.name: partner_central_get_session
tools.description: Retrieve the transcript and state of a previous Partner Central conversation session by session ID.

tools.name: partner_central_verify_connection
tools.description: Diagnostic tool — verifies AWS SSO credentials, SigV4 signing, and Partner Central reachability by sending a benign test message in Sandbox.
